MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT And Notice Of Motion For Summary Judgement, Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Mar-30-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances (via ZOOM videoconference):
Atty. R. Michael Flynn, Esq. appearing for the Plaintiff;
Atty. Ryan Stahl, esq. appearing for Defendant.

PLAINTIFF ALEXIA REIF's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION.

The matters are called. Mr. Stahl requests a short continuance of the hearing and states that the trial date is set for April 19, 2021.

ARGUMENT/DISCUSSIONS are held. At the conclusion of ARGUMENT/DISCUSSIONS, the Court stated that it would not be inclined to continue the hearing this close to the trial date.

The Court stated that it prefers for the parties to work it out but that it would take both motions under submission by the close of business on March 24, 2021. The parties are to email the Court by the close of business on March 24, 2021 if they wish for the Court to issue a ruling. In the meantime, the Court stated that it will look at all the authority and issues that counsel raised during today's argument.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com. (302/EPS)

ARGUMENT/DISCUSSIONS are held. At the conclusion of ARGUMENT/DISCUSSIONS, the Court stated that it would not be inclined to continue the hearing this close to the trial date.

The Court stated that it prefers for the parties to work it out but that it would take both motions under submission by the close of business on March 24, 2021. The parties are to email the Court by the close of business on March 24, 2021 if they wish for the Court to issue a ruling. In the meantime, the Court stated that it will look at all the authority and issues that counsel raised during today's argument.
